title: dendranthema nankingense
intro: Dendranthema nankingense, also known as the Nanking chrysanthemum or Sheng Shan Zhe, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae, native to China, and is used in traditional medicine. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema nankingense include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Dendranthema nankingense can be prepared in herbal tea or capsule form, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits.
